希望你文思泉涌，如果没有灵感不要勉强写啊，希望千万别烂尾。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1724262412,"group_id":"7387255919739931672","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"喜欢万人迷，爽文系列","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Ny8xjPgdo219afRXFICiLoY=","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/c91121fae98a414091ab711f8d57863d~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776709828&x-signature=WfZSk1SOUow4mT86kvLgCMyLgtg%3D","user_id":"910041232711934","user_name":"乂葭"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"910041232711934","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":true,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7387255919739931672","book_info":{"abstract":"【美食】【系统】【日常】【下饭】【医食同源】
刚从中医院毕业的庄明，意外获得系统，没看清就选择了绑定，结果看到系统名字“天下第一·妙手回春·包治百病·手到病除……的厨神系统！”，悬着的心终于是彻底死了。
标价高、店面破，各种奇葩规矩一大堆。
但随着第一个客人的出现，才发现小店好像有点不同。
绿豆汤清香可口，消暑解渴。
红糖醪糟酒香迷人，暖宫驱寒。
鸡汤素面一嗦入魂，养胃补气。
这是第一个成功申请世界遗产的小吃店！
“神奇，多年老寒腿治好了，腿不抽筋脚也不麻，还能跳广场舞，找回第二春！”
“治不孕不育的第一神医，他平时的工作就是做饭煲汤。”
“庄神医，你这是切菜刀还是手术刀啊……”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2oed5bd7aa55e459257ae097fe3c81cb42~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"锦衣猫","author_id":"","book_id":"7387255919739931672","book_name":"全靠小吃店，景区升5A了？","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#382818","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1261人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":263,"name":"都市种田","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=263&name=都市种田&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":26,"name":"神医","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=26&name=神医&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":78,"name":"美食","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=78&name=美食&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":840,"name":"发家致富","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=840&name=发家致富&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7387255923527402008","read_count":"1261","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"326047"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.0","serial_count":"163","tags":"都市种田,都市,系统,神医,美食,发家致富","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/c67659d3b5c133eaf045ec2673294205~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779363673&x-signature=7Fa64KKvkUS0Pe7ZNgJ8kZkCueo%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"4059049296663192","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"73"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603221941138F79DB075E6743C8731C"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读55分钟后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":5,"forwarde
